name: FaceStudio Face Dataset
description: AI-generated face images tagged by gender, age band, and ethnicity for use as account profile pictures in the seeder.

catalog.name: Visual Assets
catalog.description: Visual media assets including country flag images, cryptocurrency icons, and generated face images used to enrich reference data displays.

sources.name: FaceStudio API
sources.description: AI-generated face images from facestudio.app, downloaded via the public REST API.
sources.license: Permissive for internal use — no attribution required. Competitive reuse prohibited (Clause 8). See methodology.txt for full licence notes.

datasets.name: Generated Face Images
datasets.description: AI-generated face images tagged by gender presentation (male/female), age band (20–70 in 5-year steps), and ethnicity (7 categories). Each combination may have multiple images indexed _01, _02, … for variety.
datasets.tag_description: Generated face images for account profile pictures
